productDisplayName: Chhota Bheem Kids Boys Yeh Dosthi Rust Tshirt
description: Composition Orange T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round neck, and graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care Wash separately using a mild detergent Line dry inside-out in shade Warm iron; do not iron on print Dress your little one in this T-shirt from Green Gold's collection and watch him revel in the pure joy of having his best cartoon friends from chhota bheem on his tee.
